title: OREGON MEDICARE SAVINGS CONNECT - 211info
text: CENTRAL OFFICE OREGON MEDICARE SAVINGS CONNECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists with paying for Medicare Part B and D premiums, co-pays/deductibles, and prescription costs. 209 SW 4th Avenue Suite 510 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: -Part B assistance: Single person monthly gross income at or below $1,781; Couple monthly gross income at or below $2,400 -Part D assistance: Single person monthly gross income at or below $1,975 (savings and other resources are less than $17,600); Couple monthly gross income at or below $2,664 (savings and other resources are less than $35,130) Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email - (855) 447-0155 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (855) 447-0155 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Medicare Information/Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - ADULT CARE OPTIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PUBLIC GUARDIAN AND CONSERVATOR PROGRAM INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM INFORMATION SERVICES - HOARDING RESOURCES PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - SNAP, MEDICAID, AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTRAL OFFICE
